title: Kismet Pack
description: Vanilla + Modpack designed for the Kismet Minecraft Server.
body:
This is the Kismet Minecraft Modpack which is intended to be a vanilla+ modpack with the aim of expanding what you can find in the world, with a few small mods added for fun moments to make and find.

It is made with multiplayer in mind but can be played singleplayer; it has many mods aimed at improving the multiplayer experience, like [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice), chat mods to improve chat functionality, and [Xaero's Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) + [Open parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims).

There are the common fabric optimization mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Plus [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)), plus visual tweaking mods, ui mods, and sound mods to improve the overall feel of the game. 

Aside from whats already mentioned, there are some content mods to add things to expand what's in vanilla to add more weapons, netherite, and just things to do. Also added are world generation mods like [Terra](https://modrinth.com/plugin/terra) and [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium), as well as structure mods to add fun things to find throughout the world.

Some gameplay mods include [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins), [Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills)

This pack is currently in active development and what's in it is subject to massive change, but suggestions are completely welcome.
